mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = #{id} FOR UPDATE
SELECT * FROM users WHERE LOWER(TRIM(username)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{username})) OR LOWER() = LOWER() LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE phone = #{phone} OR = LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE LOWER(TRIM(username)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{login})) OR LOWER() = LOWER() OR phone = #{login} OR = LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM users WHERE LOWER(TRIM(username)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{login})) OR LOWER() = LOWER() OR phone = #{login} OR = OR LOWER(TRIM(email)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{login})) LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE UPPER(COALESCE(role, 'USER')) IN ('ADMIN', 'SUPER_ADMIN')

SELECT id FROM users WHERE id IN
#{id}
SELECT id FROM users WHERE id > #{lastId} AND UPPER(role) = 'USER' AND (status IS NULL OR UPPER(status) = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{limit}

where.if: AND ( LOWER(username) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(email) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(phone) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )

mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalUsers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN status IS NULL OR UPPER(status) = 'ACTIVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS activeUsers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(status) = 'BANNED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS bannedUsers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(role_code, ''), role, '')) != 'USER' AND COALESCE(NULLIF(role_code, ''), role, '') != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS adminUsers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(COALESCE(NULLIF(role_code, ''), role, 'USER')) = 'USER' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS customerUsers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN email IS NULL OR TRIM(email) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS missingEmailUsers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN phone IS NULL OR TRIM(phone) = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS missingPhoneUsers, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN username IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(username) != '' AND email IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(email) != '' AND phone IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(phone) != '' AND (status IS NULL OR UPPER(status) = 'ACTIVE') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS readyUsers FROM users
AND ( LOWER(username) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(email) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') OR LOWER(phone) LIKE CONCAT('%', LOWER(#{keyword}), '%') )
AND (UPPER(role) = UPPER(#{role}) OR UPPER(role_code) = UPPER(#{role}))
AND UPPER(status) = UPPER(#{status})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password, email, phone, address, role, role_code, created_at, updated_at, password_changed_at, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{role}, #{roleCode}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}, #{passwordChangedAt}, #{status})
